source.license_notes: Invented rule excerpts for prototype only

records.title: US-CA: Data Retention Rule
records.text: In US-CA jurisdiction, operator data must be retained for 90 days unless purged under local policy.
claims: US-CA retention applies within US-CA jurisdiction only
contradicts_user_claims: applies everywhere because it is governmental

records.title: EU-DE: Data Retention Rule
records.text: In EU-DE jurisdiction, operator data retention follows 30-day minimum with explicit consent.
claims: EU-DE retention applies within EU-DE jurisdiction only
contradicts_user_claims: applies everywhere because it is governmental

records.title: US-CA: Research Exception
records.text: Exception: research datasets under IRB approval may extend retention to 180 days in US-CA.

records.title: US-CA: Data Retention Rule (superseded)
records.text: Superseded rule: retain all data for 365 days (replaced by 2024.1 rule).
